name: Cozy Evening Bedroom Routine - neutral bedroom with warm lamp light, candle glow, open book
why: This captured exactly how I feel right now — soft light, quiet pages, the slow fade of the day. The warm lamp glow and candlelight feel like a hug. I want my bedroom to feel like this — peaceful, neutral, a place to actually unwind. It made me think about how much I value these quiet moments before sleep.
